message:
fix: exclude ephemeral wisps from bd backup export (bd-qwa3)

bd backup was exporting the entire wisps table (and wisp_events,
wisp_comments, wisp_dependencies, wisp_labels) into the JSONL backup
files, causing massive pollution (e.g. 15,270 wisps out of 16,645 rows
in HQ backup). Wisps are ephemeral by design and should not be in
backups -- restoring from backup would re-create all wisp pollution.

Remove all wisp table exports from backup_export.go, along with the
now-unused tableExistsCheck and exportTableAppend functions. This
aligns bd backup with the daemon jsonl_git_backup.go which already
correctly excludes wisps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
